rooms.title: Makamuri ekushandura
rooms.subtitle: Misangano yako yekuturikira panguva imwe chete inoshanda
rooms.noRoomsInCategory: Hapana makamuri ari muchikamu ichi parizvino.

confirmDelete.title: Bvisa imba zvachose here?
confirmDelete.message: Izvi zvichavhara musangano wevatori vechikamu vese uye zvichadzima data rese.

enterprise.label: Zvirongwa zveEnterprise
enterprise.sub: Kiyi yeGemini, Quest Flow, ma tag, CRM

call.waitingSubtitle: Takamirira kuti munhu anotaura neni apindure...
call.expandPeerSub: Mutauriri wacho ari pahwindo rese, uri mukona
call.roomFull: 🚫 Imba yacho yagara vanhu - yatova nevanhu vaviri varimo

coach.title: Mubatsiri weAI: Maitiro Ekupindura
coach.promptPlaceholder: Bvunza chero chinhu - nezvehurukuro kana chero mubvunzo wako

tonePrompts.formal: Pindura nenzira yakasimbiswa uye ine hunhu hwakanaka.
tonePrompts.scientific: Pindura semusayendisiti, uine zvinongedzo zvekutsvagisa kana data.
tonePrompts.empathic: Pindura netsitsi, uchiratidza kunzwisisa manzwiro emumwe munhu.

roomActions.deleteSub: Vhara musangano uye dzima data rese

billing.quotaExhaustedSub: Bot rekushandura ramiswa. Ndapota tenga mamwe maminitsi.
billing.lowBalanceSub: Tenga mamwe maminitsi kuti hurukuro yenyu irambe ichienderera mberi.
billing.paywallNoSub: Kuti ugadzire imba, ndapota nyoresa kuti uwane chirongwa
billing.paywallLowBalance: Hapana maminitsi asara pamari yako yasara - nyoresa kuti uwane chirongwa kana kutenga zvimwe

changePwd.title: Chinja password
changePwd.errNoPassword: Kuchinja password hakuwanikwe paaccount iyi (Google sign-in).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: Password ye super-admin yakaiswa mu configuration ye server.

sip.title: Nhare yeSIP
sip.subtitle: Kugadzirisa ma trunks ekufona anopinda nekubuda
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Password itsva (siya isina chinhu kuti isachinje)

incoming.heading: Mafoni eSIP ari kuuya
incoming.lead: Kero yeSIP yakasiyana yekutumira mafoni ekunze kubva kune mupi wako kuenda kuVibeVox system.
incoming.emptyTitle: Kero yeSIP iri kuuya haina kugadzirwa
incoming.emptyHint: Gadzira SIP URI yakasarudzika + login/password kuitira kuti vatengi vagone kukufonera kubva chero pafoni, uye VibeVox ichashandura izwi rako otomatiki panguva chaiyo.
incoming.activeHint: Muturikiri weBridge anoteerera mukamuri. Kufona kwese kunoshandurwa panguva chaiyo.
incoming.pausedHint: Shandisa reception kuti VibeVox itange kutumira mafoni anouya.

outbound.heading: Kufona kuri kubuda
outbound.lead: Fonera nhamba yefoni kubva pawebhusaiti uye VibeVox ichatumira hurukuro yako otomatiki panguva chaiyo.
outbound.noTrunkHint: Zadza fomu rekuti "New SIP Trunk" riri pamusoro pepeji - VibeVox ichashandisa mupi wako weSIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, nezvimwewo) pakufona.
outbound.configureFirst: Kutanga, gadzira SIP Trunk inobuda (fomu riri pamusoro)
outbound.invalidNumber: Ndapota isa nhamba chaiyo mufomati yepasi rose (+XXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Maitiro ekugadzirisa
howTo.step1: Wana matsamba eSIP Trunk kubva kune anokupa ruzivo (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step3: VibeVox ichagadzira otomatiki SIP Trunk inobuda muLiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Kuchauya munguva pfupi: SIP URI iri kuuya yekutumira mafoni ekunze.

tenantOnly.title: SIP Trunks inogadziriswa padanho remurendi
tenantOnly.hint1: Nhare yeSIP haigone kugadziriswa pasi peakaundi yesuperadmin (isina UUID yemugari).
tenantOnly.hint2: Pinda semushandisi wenguva dzose ane tenantId yake yekugadzira Trunk.

sip.connected: SIP Trunk yakachengetwa uye yakawiriraniswa neLiveKit

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Magadzirirwo acho achadzimwa. Mafoni anobuda achamira kusvika wagadzirazve Trunk.
danger.deleteInboundHint: LiveKit inbound Trunk uye dispatch rule zvichabviswa. Mafoni anouya haazogamuchirwi.
danger.reissueHint: Bvisazve login nepassword yekero yeSIP. Ruzivo rwekare haruchashandi.

outbound2.rateInfo: Mutengo wepaminiti imwe neimwe wekufona kunobuda unotsanangurwa nevanopa SIP yako.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Chiito ichi hachidzoreki. Kana chadzimwa, mafoni anobuda anomira kusvika Trunk itsva yagadzirwa.
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Chiito ichi hachidzoreki. Inbound Trunk + dispatch rule muLiveKit Cloud zvichabviswa.

page.title: Zvirongwa zveEnterprise
page.subtitle: Zvese zvinobatanidzwa, makiyi, uye ma parameter eAI eakaundi yako
page.upsellBody: Pano unogona kugadzirisa: kiyi yeGemini API yako, prompt uye ruzivo, kubatanidzwa neQuest Flow + Telegram bot, uye kubatana neChatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Kiyi yeGoogle Gemini API
gemini.lead: Kiyi yako wega kubva kuAI Studio. Iyi inotsiva kiyi yepasi rose yemafoni ese eGemini ari muakaundi yako.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Yashandiswa pachinzvimbo chepasi rose pamafoni ese eGemini ari paaccount yako.
gemini.successValid: Kiyi yacho inoshanda - Gemini API iripo.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Bvisa kiyi yeGemini yemurendi wega wega?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Mashandiro eAI achashandisa kiyi yakagovaniswa yeVibeVox (kana yakagadzirirwa).

telegram.heading: Bot yeTelegram yekuzivisa
telegram.lead: Gadzira bot uchishandisa @BotFather woisa token yayo. Chero ani zvake anotumira bot iyi meseji ne /start achagamuchira zviziviso: vatengi vatsva, ma tag, zvikanganiso zvekubatanidza. Unogona kunyoresa vashandi vakawanda kana kuwedzera bot kuboka kana chiteshi—zviziviso zvichatumirwa kune wese munhu otomatiki.
telegram.leadAfterStart: , ichagamuchira zviziviso nezvevatengi vatsva, ma tag, uye zvikanganiso zvekubatanidza. Unogona kunyoresa vashandi vakawanda kana kuwedzera bot kuboka kana chiteshi—munhu wese achagamuchira chiziviso chacho otomatiki.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} yakachengetedzwa. Kwaziso yatumirwa kune vanyoreri ve {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} yakachengetedzwa. Munhu wese anotumira meseji /start achagamuchira zviziviso.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Meseji yatumirwa kune vanogamuchira {{count}}. Ndapota tarisai Telegram.

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Chengeta uye simbisa kiyi yeAPI kutanga — kugadzira mifananidzo kunoda izvozvo.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana inogadza, kugadzirisa uye kugadzira mifananidzo. Imagen inongogadzirwa kubva pakutanga chete.

prompt.heading: Mazano
prompt.subtitle: Prompt uye ruzivo rwekunyora zvinyorwa mumakamuri evhidhiyo chete
prompt.kbLabel: Ruzivo (mamiriro ekambani, Mibvunzo Inowanzo bvunzwa, chokwadi)
prompt.appendNote: Unogona kuwedzera mitemo yako wega - ichasanganiswa neiyo default.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: chete pakubvisa mashoko ari mumakamuri evhidhiyo
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - paunodzvanya meseji muhurukuro wobva wasarudza toni
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Inoshandiswa paunodzvanya meseji muhurukuro yemukamuri revhidhiyo wobva wasarudza toni
prompt.defaultSummary: Zvinoshandiswa neAI nekutadza (kana munda wako usina chinhu) - tinya kuti uone
prompt.extendNoteText: nemitemo/maitiro/mazwi avo - zvichabatanidzwa neiyo default prompt iri pamusoro apa pamwe neruzivo rwacho.
prompt.kbLead: Isa gwaro—katarogu, FAQ, runyorwa rwemitengo, mitemo, kana zvinhu zvekubatsira. Zviri mukati zvinoongororwa paserver (Word/Excel/CSV → text) uye zvinobatanidzwa neAI pakunyora mameseji mumakamuri evhidhiyo. Muganho: 50 MB faira / mavara 500,000 mudhatabhesi.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Magwaro ese akaiswa achanyangarika. Chiito ichi hachigone kudzoserwa shure.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Muhurukuro yeEnterprise Room, unogona kusimbisa chero meseji uye kukumbira AI kuti itsanangure nezwi rakasarudzwa.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: inoshandisa prompt yako kubva mundima iri pamusoro.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Mhinduro dzeAI kune vatengi kuburikidza neTelegram bots uye Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Kana munda usina chinhu, VibeVox prompt inoshandiswa.
questFlow.headerLead: Kukurukurirana kweAI nemutengi wega wega kuburikidza neTelegram bot yakabatana neQuest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Kiyi yega yega chakavanzika chaunoisa muQuest Flow HTTP block yecheni. VibeVox inoishandisa kuziva account yako. Unogona kugadzira makiyi akawanda emacheni akasiyana.
questFlow.promptLead1: Inosarudza kuti AI inotaurirana sei nevatengi kuburikidza neQuest Flow: matauriro, maitiro, uye zvekuziva.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Zvinoshandiswa neAI nekutadza (kana munda wako usina chinhu) - tinya kuti uone
questFlow.kbLead1: Magwaro - katarogu yebasa, runyorwa rwemitengo, FAQ. Isa TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI haizove neruzivo rwekambani; ichapindura chete zvichibva paruzivo rwese. Hwaro uhwu
questFlow.kbLead3: Kubva muchikamu che "Mazano"—chekunyora vhidhiyo. Muganho: 50 MB faira / mavara 500,000 mudhatabhesi.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Quest Flow ruzivo ruchabviswa. Chiito ichi hachigone kudzoserwa shure.
questFlow.tagsLead: Iyo AI inopa ma tag aya kune vatengi kana ikaona kuti pane chinhu chakafanana muhurukuro. Ma tag aya anoratidzwa pakadhi rekamuri remutengi uye anotumirwa kuCRM (Chikamu 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Kiyi ichadzimwa zvachose. Quest Flow haichashandi nayo — uchafanira kugadzira kiyi itsva woitsiva muchirongwa.

chatwoot.heading: Kubatanidzwa kweCRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Tumira otomatiki nhoroondo yekufona uye ma tag kuChatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Inotumira nhoroondo yehurukuro uye ma tag ezvinodiwa nevatengi kuChatwoot CRM
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Chiratidzo Chekuwana Mumiriri (kubva paProfile → Chiratidzo Chekuwana)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Kubatana kuri kushanda - Chatwoot iri kupindura.
chatwoot.successSaved: Yakachengetedzwa. Zvino tinya "Kuedzwa kwekubatana" kuti utarise.
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Kukurukurirana nechinyorwa chakavanzika = nhoroondo yakazara yekukurukurirana
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Ma tag ese akapihwa ezvinodiwa mu
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Zvinotumirwa kana ukadzvanya "Tumira kuCRM" nemaoko mukamuri rekutaura. Kutumira otomatiki kana tag yaonekwa ndicho chinhu chinotevera.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Chiito ichi hachigone kubviswa. Rugwaro nenhau dzakabatanidzwa zvichadzimwa.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Makamuri ekukurukurirana chinhu cheEnterprise. Simudzira hurongwa hwako muchikamu che "Mitengo".
chat.empty: Hapana mameseji ari muhurukuro iyi parizvino.

insights.title: Kuongorora hurukuro
insights.tooShort: Hurukuro yacho ipfupi zvakanyanya kuti isanyatsoongororwa.

lobby.title: Kupinda musangano wevhidhiyo
lobby.subtitle: Kufona kwevhidhiyo nekushandura kweAI panguva imwe chete
lobby.languageHint: Uchanzwa uye uchaona zvinyorwa zvidiki kubva kune anokutaurira zviri mumutauro iwoyo.
lobby.shareHint: Kopa wotumira kune wauri kutaura naye kuti amukoke kumusangano.
lobby.audioConsent: , uye zvakare kubvumirana kuti odhiyo igadziriswe kuti ishandiswe pakushandura.
lobby.roomFullMsg: Patova nemunhu ari mumusangano. Bata mugadziri wemusangano kana kukumbira mumwe mutsva.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Chinongedzo chacho chakakopwa. Chitumire kune waunosangana naye kuburikidza neTelegram / WhatsApp / Email. Unogona kuvhara peji izvozvi—chinongedzo chinoshanda nguva dzose.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Kuti ugadzire imba, ndapota nyoresa kuti uwane chirongwa
paywall.titleLowBalance: Hapana maminitsi asara pamari yako yasara - nyoresa kuti uwane chirongwa kana kutenga zvimwe
paywall.subtitle: Sarudza hurongwa kana kutenga mamwe maminitsi - bhadhara uchishandisa Stripe, dzosera mari yako ipapo ipapo.
paywall.topupNote: Maminitsi achawedzerwa pamari yako mushure mekubhadhara.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Hauna kunyoresa kuri kushanda. Plus zvichawedzerwa pakutenga kwako kwe€19/mwedzi—maminitsi makumi matanhatu anobatanidzwa muchirongwa chako, saka hapana imwe mari yekuwedzera.
paywall.stripeNote: Mari yekubhadhara inodzivirirwa neStripe. Maminitsi anongoiswa otomatiki mushure mekubhadhara.

billingPage.title: Mitero uye kubhadhara
billingPage.subtitle: Zvese zviri muVibeVox — sarudza hurongwa hunoenderana nemafambiro ako ebasa.
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Dzimai kuvandudzwa otomatiki. Kunyoreswa kwenyu kucharamba kuripo kusvika pakupera kwenguva iripo.
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Kubhadhara kunotevera kuchaitwa pakupera kwenguva iripo.
billingPage.promoHint: Dhisikaundi yacho ichashandiswa otomatiki kana ukanyoresa kuchirongwa kana kutenga mamwe maminitsi.
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Maminitsi akatorwa kubva munguva yapfuura. Anotanga apera.
billingPage.topupHelp: Top-up slider. Chinowanikwa nekunyorera kuri kushanda.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Kune vanhu vanoshanda vega uye vanoshanda vega
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Kune zvikwata nevanoita hurukuro vari kushanda
billingPage.featureRollover: Kuenderera mberi kwemaminitsi kusvika kumwedzi unotevera
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Mhoroi! Ndiri kufarira Enterprise VibeVox plan.
billingPage.faqA1: Maminiti asina kushandiswa anoendeswa kumwedzi unotevera. Anopera mumwedzi wechitatu.
billingPage.faqQ2: Ndingakwanisa here kudzima kunyorera kwangu chero nguva?
billingPage.faqA2: Ehe. Unogona kudzima account yako nekudzvanya kamwe chete. Nguva yatobhadharwa icharamba iripo kusvika yapera.
billingPage.faqA3: Full AI stack: makadhi evatengi ane auto-recognition, Telegram authorization, personalized prompts, Google Calendar, smart needs tagging, CRM export, kubatanidzwa ne questflow.pro, uye admin tab yakasiyana.
billingPage.faqA4: Chero chipi zvacho chinoenderana neRFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, nezvimwewo. VibeVox inogadzira outbound Trunk automatically.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 paminiti. Kubva pamaminitsi makumi matanhatu kusvika maawa gumi. Inobhadharwa ipapo ipapo mushure mekubhadhara.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Maminitsi emitero aripo kusvika pazuva iri; mamwe maminetsi anogona kutengwa.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Maminitsi ehurongwa hwako anoshanda kusvika pazuva rino; unogona kutenga mamwe. Dzvanya "Tangazve" kana ukachinja pfungwa dzako.
billingPage.languagesLead: Rondedzero yakazara yemitauro inotsigirwa nekushandura panguva imwe chete. Kuona mutauro wepakutanga otomatiki—mutori wechikamu mumwe nemumwe anosarudza mutauro wake wemuno.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Mutauro wacho hauna kuwanikwa pane runyorwa rwemitauro inotsigirwa.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Edza kuperetera kwakasiyana—semuenzaniso, muchiRungu kana muarufabheti yemuno. Kana mutauro wacho usiripo, tizivisei, uye tichauwedzera.

register.title: Gadzira account
register.subtitle: Kunyoresa mahara paVibeVox
register.passwordTooShort: Password inofanira kunge yakareba mavara masere kana kupfuura
register.emailExists: Mushandisi ane email iyi akatonyoreswa kare.

forgot.title: Kudzoreredza mapassword
forgot.subtitle: Isa email yako uye tichakutumira link yekudzoreredza.
forgot.successHint: Tarisa email yako {{email}}. Kana usingaone email yacho, tarisa folder rako re spam.

reset.title: Password itsva
reset.subtitle: Sarudza password itsva kuti upinde.
reset.successHint: Iye zvino unogona kupinda nepassword yako itsva.
reset.invalidLink: Chinongedzo hachishande kana kuti chapera. Kumbira kuti password idzoserwe patsva.

seo.title: VibeVox — Shanduro yeAI yenguva chaiyo yekufona kwevhidhiyo uye SIP
seo.description: VibeVox ipuratifomu yekushandura izwi inoshandisirwa neAI panguva imwe chete inotsigira mitauro inopfuura zana. Kufona kwevhidhiyo, SIP telephony, kutaura kwevatengi, uye kuongorora hurukuro inoshandisirwa neAI zviripo.
seo.keywords: Kushandura kweAI, kushandura panguva imwe chete, mafoni evhidhiyo nekushandura, SIP telephony, mushanduri wezwi

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox mushanduri weAI anoshandura panguva imwe chete mafoni ezwi nemavhidhiyo mumitauro 108. WebRTC neSIP telephony, mubatsiri wezwi, uye kushandura panguva chaiyo pane chero mudziyo.
pwaInstall.installCta: Wedzera VibeVox pachiratidziro chako chekumba—mafoni ane dudziro, SIP, uye mubatsiri weAI nekudzvanya kamwe chete. Inoshanda seapp yemuno.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Enda kuchidzitiro chekutanga - vhura nekudzvanya kamwe chete

partner.title: Chirongwa chekubatana
partner.subtitle: Goverana chinongedzo chako uwane mari
partner.termsEmpty: Mitemo yechirongwa haisati yagadzwa. Ndapota bata SuperAdmin.
